impact_desc: Self-made Part Manufacturing Quality Trace Chain: Piston Rod Assembly is associated with Piston Rod Chrome Plating Visual Inspection and Chrome Plating Scratch on Piston Rod.
Self-made Part Manufacturing Quality Trace Chain: Cylinder Barrel Assembly is associated with Cylinder Barrel Inner Bore Dimension Measurement and Seal Ring Compression Damage.
Purchased and Outsourced Part Quality Trace Chain: Front End Cap is associated with Sealing Performance Inspection and Scratch on Cylinder Barrel Inner Wall.
Purchased and Outsourced Part Quality Trace Chain: Rear End Cap is associated with Pressure Holding Leakage Rate Recheck and Pressure Holding Leakage Rate Out of Tolerance.
Assembly and Final Inspection Quality Trace Chain: Seal Ring Assembly is associated with Extension and Retraction Stroke Measurement and Actuation Hysteresis.
Assembly and Final Inspection Quality Trace Chain: Trunnion Bushing is associated with Trunnion Bushing Fit Clearance Inspection and Minor Leakage at Hydraulic Fitting.
Process Parameter Anomaly Trace Chain: Spherical Bearing is associated with Hydraulic Fitting Leakage Inspection and Excessive Trunnion Bushing Clearance.
Process Parameter Anomaly Trace Chain: Throttle Connector is associated with Final Functional Test and Loose Displacement Sensor Bracket.
In-service Maintenance Feedback Trace Chain: Displacement Sensor Bracket is associated with Piston Rod Chrome Plating Visual Inspection and Chrome Plating Scratch on Piston Rod.
In-service Maintenance Feedback Trace Chain: Locking Nut is associated with Cylinder Barrel Inner Bore Dimension Measurement and Seal Ring Compression Damage.
